title: vfork() Process Creation and Execution Flow
description: A visual representation of the vfork() system call process, highlighting the shared address space between parent and child, the suspension of the parent, and the critical exec or exit step.
relationships: vfork() creates a child which shares the parent's address space and suspends the parent
Child must call exec() to load a new program or exit() to terminate
After child calls exec()/exit(), the parent process resumes execution
